pages.text: The Calamity Chancellor possesses a gem that amplifies spell potency. Coating it with honey, sprinkling white sugar, then immersing it in concentrated emerald essence might allow you to absorb its power to enhance magical prowess...$(br)Grants consumer:$(br)$(li)10-minute Spell Mastery III$(li)8-minute Regeneration II$(li)15-minute Nourishment$(br)Permanently increases Potency level by one upon consumption, up to three activations.
